welcome.title: Ask AI
welcome.subtitle: Get help with writing, answering questions, or generating ideas for your document.

edit-chat-title.title: New chat title
html: <input id="new-chat-title" type="text" value="{{SESSION_TITLE}}" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 14pt; font-weight: bold;" />

delete-session.title: Delete Chat Session
delete-session.html: Sure you want to delete the session "{{SESSION_TITLE}}"?

prompt-style.custom-placeholder: Enter your custom system prompt here...
prompt-style.no-custom-prompts: No custom styles yet. Create one below or in the chat panel.

sign-in.title: Sign in to GitHub Copilot
html: It has been copied to your clipboard. Please open the following link in your browser
and paste the code to sign in:
Press OK after you have completed the verification.

sign-in-request-failed.title: GitHub Copilot sign-in request failed
html: Could not send the sign-in request to GitHub Copilot.
This may be due to a network issue. Please check your internet connection and try again.

sign-in-verification-failed.title: GitHub Copilot sign-in verification failed
html: Failed to complete the sign-in process for GitHub Copilot.
Please ensure that you have finished the verification in your browser before clicking OK.
If the issue persists, check your internet connection and try again.

warn-nodejs-above-20-required-for-typora.title: Node.js ≥ 20 is required to run this plugin under Typora ≥ 1.10
html: Node.js ≥ 20 is required to run this plugin under Typora ≥ 1.10,
but no valid Node.js path is found.
≥ 20 or specify Node.js path in “Settings → Node.js → Node.js path”, and restart Typora

warn-nodejs-above-20-required-for-typora.title: Node.js ≥ 20 is required to run this plugin under Typora < 1.9
html: Node.js ≥ 20 is required to run this plugin under Typora < 1.9,
but no valid Node.js path is found.
≥ 20 or specify Node.js path in “Settings → Node.js → Node.js path”, and restart Typora

warn-nodejs-above-20-required-on-macOS.title: Node.js ≥20 is required to run this plugin
html: Node.js ≥ 20 is required to run this plugin on macOS,
but no valid Node.js path is found.
≥ 20 or specify Node.js path in “Settings → Node.js → Node.js path”, and restart Typora

menu.not-authorized: Your GitHub account is not subscribed to Copilot

language.label: Language
language.description: UI language. Auto follows system settings. Changes take effect immediately.

disable-completions.label: Disable completions
disable-completions.description: Disable AI completions or suggestions in Typora

use-inline-completion-text-in-source.label: Use inline completion text in source mode (Beta)
use-inline-completion-text-in-source.description: Use inline completion text in source mode instead of suggestion panel

use-inline-completion-text-in-preview-co.label: Use inline completion text in preview code blocks (Early alpha)
use-inline-completion-text-in-preview-co.description: Use inline completion text in preview code blocks instead of suggestion panel
use-inline-completion-text-in-preview-co.warning: This feature is still in early alpha and is likely to corrupt your document. Use with caution.

chat-scope.label: Chat Scope
chat-scope.description: Global: shared chat across all documents. Per Document: separate chat per file. Switching clears current data.

completion-max-tokens.label: Completion Length
completion-max-tokens.description: Max tokens for inline completion text. Higher = longer completions. Range: 10–200

completion-temperature.label: Temperature
completion-temperature.description: Randomness of completions. 0 = most deterministic, higher = more diverse. Range: 0–2.0

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Select the AI provider. DeepSeek and Custom use your own API key.

deepseek-api-key.label: API Key
deepseek-api-key.description: Your API key from the provider platform. Stored locally.

custom-api-base.label: API Base URL
custom-api-base.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1

custom-api-key.label: API Key
custom-api-key.description: API key for the custom provider. Stored locally.

custom-completion-model.label: Completion Model (optional)
custom-completion-model.description: Model for inline completions. Leave empty to use chat model.

custom-prompts.label: Custom Conversation Styles
custom-prompts.description: Create named system prompts. Select them in the chat panel to switch conversation style.

nodejs.title: Node.js
nodejs.note: Since Typora v1.10, Node.js ≥ 20 is required for all platforms to run this plugin.

node-path.label: Node.js path (applied after restart)
node-path.description: Select or enter the Node.js path to use for running Copilot LSP

message.updated-auto: Updated Node.js path to auto detected path
message.warn-invalid: Failed to retrieve Node.js version for "{{PATH}}"
message.warn-invalid-version: Expected Node.js version ≥ 20 for "{{PATH}}", but got {{VERSION}}
message.warn-empty-select-or-input: Please select or enter a valid Node.js path
message.warn-empty-input: Please enter a valid Node.js path
